notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Core buttons.home intentionally uses only clean storage table ak_post_buttons.
Legacy ak_comment_banners_v3 was identified diagnostically but is not a Core working adapter and is ignored by future architecture.
New CTA/button creation flow now starts from Core buttons.add, selects a post, accepts title and URL, then saves to ak_post_buttons via postAddonManager.addButton.
This build only saves clean Core data; it does not patch MAX posts yet.
The next step after testing is a clean Core post patch pipeline that reads ak_post_buttons and updates selected posts without legacy wrappers.
